name: Corny Polenta
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Nonfat Vegetable Broth, Low Sodium
31 ounces (or 2 cups) Low Sodium Canned Corn or Frozen Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the broth and salt into a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Boil for 2 minutes, then remove from the flame.
4. Add all of the polenta in one batch and stir until fully incorporated.
5. Return the mixture to medium-low heat.
6. Stir constantly for 5-6 minutes.
7. About 1 minute before the cooking time is complete, add the corn.
8. Serve hot.
